goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

Make sure you get postcode and address
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
